name: Fruit & Nut Breakfast Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups golden raisins, plumped and drained
9 ounces uncooked quick oats or old fashioned oats
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13 x 9-inch nonstick baking pan with Pam and line it with a sheet of wax paper over the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
3. Set aside the raisins.
4. In a medium bowl, toss the raisins to coat them.
5. Add oats, almonds, and sugar and stir to combine.
6. In a 1 cup liquid measure, combine the remaining ingredients.
7. Add the dry ingredients and stir until moistened.
8. Press the mixture into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Cool in the pan for 30 minutes.
11. Invert the pan onto a clean work surface, discarding the wax paper.
12. Cut lengthwise, then cut each half into 12 equal bars, making 24 total.
13. Wrap each bar individually in plastic wrap and freeze for future use.
Notes:
10g fat, 0mg cholesterol per 2 bar serving: 269 calories
